'''Teevan''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] with silvery seas located within the [[Teevan system/Legends|Teevan system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It was the homeworld of the [[Teevan/Legends|Teevan]] species. [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Tru Veld/Legends|Tru Veld]] came from this world.
